Task: For a fair coin flipped 5 times, compute P(exactly 2 heads) as a reduced fraction.

[L1] Number of ways to choose 2 heads out of 5 flips is C(5,2) = 8.
[L2] Total outcomes is 2^5 = 32.
[L3] Probability is 8/32.
